items.claim: Cortez does not take her career seriously.
items.quote: I just don't know how seriously the career has been taken.

items.claim: Cortez failed to properly acclimate to the elevation for the Rose Namajunas fight.
items.quote: She didn't care to get acclimated to the to the elevation.

items.claim: Luke Riley has poor striking defense.
items.quote: The striking defense of Riley isn't really there.

items.claim: Luke Riley has mediocre takedown defense.
items.quote: His takedown defense is a bit so-so.

items.claim: Caik Machado has never been knocked out on the feet.
items.quote: he hasn't been knocked out on the feet.

items.claim: Caik Machado holds his hands too low by his waist.
items.quote: Caik Machado holds his hands very low by his waist.

items.claim: Cody Garbrandt's chin is compromised due to multiple past knockouts.
items.quote: it was only a few years ago we were talking about how his chin is complete dust.

items.claim: Nikita Krylov has been walking into punches since returning from back surgery.
items.quote: ever since he injured his back and he come back, he he has just been walking into punches

items.claim: Terrance McKinney has poor striking technique and abysmal footwork.
items.quote: McKinney's striking technique is woeful. It's terrible. He throws himself off balance. Um so, the footwork is just absolutely abysmal

items.claim: Lando Vannata is prone to getting caught due to his high-risk, flashy style.
items.quote: I think that his style is just so high-risk. You know, he's so flashy in there, and it's what got him caught by Charles Johnson and knocked out.

items.claim: Lando Vannata exits the pocket with his hands by his waist.
items.quote: he was exiting the pocket with his hands by his waist

items.claim: Brandon Royval has not been utilizing his grappling recently.
